steps.title: Identify the adaptation problem
steps.content: The passage says adapting the story was difficult because theater relies on dialogue, while the story mainly describes silent thoughts. The underlined sentence explains how Sato solved that adaptation problem.

steps.title: Reject absent topics
steps.content: A discusses casting, which is absent. C discusses influence on later playwrights, which is absent. D compares the fame of the story and play, which is also absent. The underlined sentence explains how Sato adapted the story into a play. The answer is B.
